name: 01_Create Delivery note
script:
# Script Type: DocType Event | Event: After Submit
trigger_state = "To Deliver"

# 1. Get current state from database to ensure accuracy
current_workflow_state = frappe.db.get_value("Sales Order", doc.name, "workflow_state")

# 2. Only run if workflow reaches trigger state AND doc is submitted (docstatus 1)
if current_workflow_state == trigger_state and doc.docstatus == 1:
    
    # 3. Prevent duplicate Delivery Notes
    dn_exists = frappe.db.exists("Delivery Note", {
        "against_sales_order": doc.name,
        "docstatus": ["<", 2]
    })

    if not dn_exists:
        try:
            # 4. Correct way to call the mapper function
            dn_dict = frappe.call("erpnext.selling.doctype.sales_order.sales_order.make_delivery_note", source_name=doc.name)
            
            # 5. Convert the returned dictionary into a real Document object
            dn = frappe.get_doc(dn_dict)

            # --- V16 FIX: INJECT MANDATORY ACCOUNTING DIMENSION ---
            # Look up the employee name linked to the user who triggered the submission
            linked_employee = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", {"user_id": frappe.session.user}, "name")
            
            if linked_employee:
                dn.employee = linked_employee
            # ------------------------------------------------------

            # 6. Insert and Submit
            dn.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
            dn.submit()
            
            frappe.msgprint("Success: Delivery Note " + str(dn.name) + " created.")

        except Exception as e:
            error_msg = str(e)
            
            # Log full error for Admin
            frappe.log_error("Auto-DN Failed for " + str(doc.name), error_msg)
            
            # Friendly message for Salesperson
            if "Insufficient Stock" in error_msg or "not enough stock" in error_msg.lower():
                frappe.msgprint("⚠️ Stock Issue: Sales Order approved, but stock is not available to create a Delivery Note automatically.")
            else:
                frappe.msgprint("⚠️ Auto-Delivery Failed: " + error_msg)

name: 06_get_warehouse_batches
script:
# Script Type: API
# Method Name: get_warehouse_batches

item_code = frappe.form_dict.get('item_code')
warehouse = frappe.form_dict.get('warehouse')

if not item_code or not warehouse:
    frappe.response['message'] = []
else:
    # Removed the buggy "Clean Warehouse Name" split logic
    
    # 2. SMART QUERY (Handles Bundles + Legacy Batches)
    query = """
        SELECT 
            COALESCE(sbe.batch_no, sle.batch_no) as name, 
            SUM(
                CASE 
                    WHEN sbe.name IS NOT NULL THEN 
                        (CASE WHEN sle.actual_qty < 0 THEN -1 * ABS(sbe.qty) ELSE ABS(sbe.qty) END)
                    ELSE 
                        sle.actual_qty 
                END
            ) as batch_qty, 
            b.expiry_date
        FROM 
            `tabStock Ledger Entry` sle
        LEFT JOIN 
            `tabSerial and Batch Entry` sbe ON sbe.parent = sle.serial_and_batch_bundle
        LEFT JOIN 
            `tabBatch` b ON b.name = COALESCE(sbe.batch_no, sle.batch_no)
        WHERE 
            sle.item_code = %s 
            AND sle.warehouse = %s     # <--- CHANGED FROM 'LIKE' TO EXACT MATCH '='
            AND sle.is_cancelled = 0
        GROUP BY 
            name
        HAVING 
            batch_qty > 0
        ORDER BY 
            IFNULL(b.expiry_date, '2099-12-31') ASC
    """
    
    # Pass the EXACT warehouse string instead of a wildcard
    data = frappe.db.sql(query, (item_code, warehouse), as_dict=True)
    
    # Format
    for row in data:
        if row.get('expiry_date'):
            row['expiry_date'] = str(row['expiry_date'])
        if not row.get('name'):
            row['name'] = "" # Handle generic stock

    frappe.response['message'] = data

name: 07_get_debt_ledger
script:
# SCRIPT TYPE: API
# METHOD NAME: get_debt_ledger

try:
    user = frappe.session.user

    if not user or user == "Guest":
        frappe.response["message"] = {
            "__error": "Guest session. Please login.",
            "ledger": {},
            "totals": {"deposit": 0.0, "draw": 0.0},
            "meta": {"limit": 0, "start": 0, "has_more": 0, "user": user}
        }

    else:
        start = int(frappe.form_dict.get("start") or 0)
        limit = int(frappe.form_dict.get("limit") or 20)

        # Hide cancelled
        filters = {"docstatus": ["!=", 2]}

        # Show:
        # - assigned to me (agent_name = user)
        # - OR created by me (owner = user)  -> for old records where agent_name is empty
        or_filters = [{"agent_name": user}, {"owner": user}]

        fields = [
            "name", "creation", "docstatus",
            "action_type", "customer", "amount",
            "receipt_no", "payment_type",
            "agent_name", "owner"
        ]

        rows = frappe.get_all(
            "LMT Debt Collection",
            fields=fields,
            filters=filters,
            or_filters=or_filters,
            order_by="creation desc",
            limit_start=start,
            limit_page_length=limit
        )

        # has_more
        next_row = frappe.get_all(
            "LMT Debt Collection",
            fields=["name"],
            filters=filters,
            or_filters=or_filters,
            order_by="creation desc",
            limit_start=start + limit,
            limit_page_length=1
        )
        has_more = 1 if next_row else 0

        # Totals for same filter
        total_rows = frappe.get_all(
            "LMT Debt Collection",
            fields=["action_type", "amount", "docstatus", "agent_name", "owner"],
            filters=filters,
            or_filters=or_filters,
            order_by="creation desc"
        )

        total_deposit = 0.0
        total_draw = 0.0
        for r in total_rows:
            action = (r.get("action_type") or "").strip()
            amount = frappe.utils.flt(r.get("amount") or 0)
            if r.get("docstatus") != 2:
                if action == "ايداع":
                    total_deposit += amount
                elif action == "سحب":
                    total_draw += amount

        # Group PAGE rows by date
        grouped = {}
        for row in rows:
            date_key = str(frappe.utils.getdate(row.get("creation")))
            grouped.setdefault(date_key, []).append(row)

        frappe.response["message"] = {
            "ledger": grouped,
            "totals": {"deposit": total_deposit, "draw": total_draw},
            "meta": {
                "limit": limit,
                "start": start,
                "has_more": has_more,
                "user": user,
                "rows_returned": len(rows)
            }
        }

except Exception as e:
    frappe.log_error(frappe.get_traceback(), "get_debt_ledger failed")
    frappe.response["message"] = {
        "__error": str(e),
        "ledger": {},
        "totals": {"deposit": 0.0, "draw": 0.0},
        "meta": {"limit": 0, "start": 0, "has_more": 0}
    }

script:
user = frappe.session.user
if not user or user == "Guest":
    raise frappe.PermissionError

now_dt = frappe.utils.now_datetime()
today = frappe.utils.getdate(now_dt)

# Define Tomorrow: We use this to separate "Past+Today" from "Future"
tomorrow = frappe.utils.add_days(today, 1)

year_start = frappe.utils.getdate(str(today.year) + "-01-01")
weekday = today.weekday()
week_start_date = frappe.utils.add_days(today, -weekday)

# --- FIX: Define the specific datetime variables required below ---
year_start_dt = frappe.utils.get_datetime(str(year_start) + " 00:00:00")
week_start_dt = frappe.utils.get_datetime(str(week_start_date) + " 00:00:00")

# --- Helper Function ---
def get_sum(field, action_type=None, filter_date=None, from_dt=None):
    where = ["agent_name=%s", "docstatus!=2"]
    vals = [user]

    if action_type:
        where.append("action_type=%s")
        vals.append(action_type)
    
    if from_dt:
        where.append("posting_date>=%s")
        vals.append(from_dt)
        
    # Date Separation Logic
    if filter_date == "past":
        # Includes Today and everything before
        where.append("posting_date < %s")
        vals.append(tomorrow)
    elif filter_date == "future":
        # Strictly after Today
        where.append("posting_date >= %s")
        vals.append(tomorrow)

    q = f"SELECT COALESCE(SUM({field}),0) FROM `tabLMT Debt Collection` WHERE " + " AND ".join(where)
    return float(frappe.db.sql(q, vals)[0][0] or 0)

# --- CALCULATIONS ---

# 1. Income
commission_all = get_sum("agent_commission", action_type="ايداع")
commission_week = get_sum("agent_commission", action_type="ايداع", from_dt=week_start_dt)

# 2. Outgo (Cash Withdrawals)
withdraw_cash_all = get_sum("amount", action_type="سحب")
withdraw_cash_week = get_sum("amount", action_type="سحب", from_dt=week_start_dt)

# 3. Reclaims (Deductions)
# This grabs the phantom records dated today, swallowing the full amount.
raw_reclaim_past = get_sum("percent_cust_sum", action_type="خصم تسوية", filter_date="past")

# --- GL-BASED FUTURE RECLAIM LOGIC ---
emp_id = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", {"user_id": user}, "name")

penalty_account = frappe.db.get_value(
    "GL Account Mapping",
    {
        "mapping_key": "AGENT_PENALTY_INCOME",
        "company": "الشركة الليبية الحديثة",
        "is_active": 1
    },
    "account"
)

reclaim_future_gl = 0.0
if emp_id:
    # FIX: Check the mapped account AND the actual Arabic account found in your debug logs.
    # This guarantees it will find the 11.13 LYD across those 8 future installments.
    sql_res = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT COALESCE(SUM(debit), 0)
        FROM `tabGL Entry`
        WHERE account IN (%s, 'ذمم جزاءات الموظفين - S', 'Commission Penalty Recovery - S')
          AND party = %s
          AND posting_date > %s
          AND is_cancelled = 0
    """, (penalty_account or 'Fallback', emp_id, today))
    reclaim_future_gl = float(sql_res[0][0] or 0)

# --- FIX THE "PAST VS FUTURE" UI ISSUE ---
# Since the LMT Debt phantom record is dated TODAY, it put the future money into the past.
# We subtract the future GL installments from the past total to mathematically "shift" it down a row.
reclaim_past = raw_reclaim_past - reclaim_future_gl
if reclaim_past < 0:
    reclaim_past = 0.0

# --- FINAL BALANCE ---
total_outgo = withdraw_cash_all + reclaim_past
# Final balance properly deducts past cash/penalties AND the upcoming future obligations
balance = commission_all - total_outgo - reclaim_future_gl

frappe.response["message"] = {
    "agent": user,
    "today": str(today),
    "total_collected_all": get_sum("amount", action_type="ايداع"),
    "total_collected_year": get_sum("amount", action_type="ايداع", from_dt=year_start_dt),
    "total_collected_week": get_sum("amount", action_type="ايداع", from_dt=week_start_dt),
    "total_withdraw_all": withdraw_cash_all, 
    "total_withdraw_week": withdraw_cash_week, 
    "commission_all": commission_all,
    "commission_week": commission_week,
    "reclaim_past_today": reclaim_past, 
    "reclaim_future": reclaim_future_gl, 
    "commission_paid_past": total_outgo,
    "commission_remaining_future": balance, 
}

name: 12_prevent_negative_draw
script:
if not doc.agent_name:
    doc.agent_name = frappe.session.user

# Enforce rule ONLY for Draw
if (doc.action_type or "").strip() == "سحب":

    agent = doc.agent_name

    # Total commission earned from deposits
    earned = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT COALESCE(SUM(agent_commission), 0)
        FROM `tabLMT Debt Collection`
        WHERE agent_name=%s
          AND docstatus!=2
          AND action_type=%s
    """, (agent, "ايداع"))[0][0] or 0

    # Total withdrawn
    withdrawn = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0)
        FROM `tabLMT Debt Collection`
        WHERE agent_name=%s
          AND docstatus!=2
          AND action_type=%s
    """, (agent, "سحب"))[0][0] or 0

    earned = float(earned or 0)
    withdrawn = float(withdrawn or 0)

    # If editing existing draw → subtract old value
    if doc.name and not doc.is_new():
        old = frappe.db.get_value(
            "LMT Debt Collection",
            doc.name,
            ["amount", "action_type"],
            as_dict=True
        )
        if old and (old.action_type or "").strip() == "سحب":
            withdrawn = withdrawn - float(old.amount or 0)

    available = earned - withdrawn
    requested = float(doc.amount or 0)

    if requested > available:
        frappe.throw(
            "Not allowed: maximum allowed draw is "
            + str(round(available, 2))
            + " but you requested "
            + str(round(requested, 2))
        )

name: 23_delete_draft_order_after_48_hours
script:
# Server Script: 24_delete_draft_order_after_48_hours
# Type: Scheduler Event
# Frequency: Cron (0 * * * *)

# --- SETTINGS ---
OLDER_THAN_HOURS = 48
BATCH_LIMIT = 50  # Delete max 50 at a time to prevent timeout

# --- CALCULATE CUTOFF ---
now = frappe.utils.now_datetime()
cutoff = frappe.utils.add_to_date(now, hours=-OLDER_THAN_HOURS)

# --- FIND ABANDONED DRAFTS ---
# We filter by 'modified' so we don't delete files you are currently editing
old_sos = frappe.get_all(
    "Sales Order",
    filters={
        "docstatus": 0,             # 0 means Draft
        "modified": ("<", cutoff)   # Not touched in 48+ hours
    },
    fields=["name", "modified"],
    limit_page_length=BATCH_LIMIT
)

deleted_count = 0
failed_count = 0
errors = []

# --- DELETE LOOP ---
for row in old_sos:
    so_name = row.get("name")
    try:
        # Get doc and verify status one last time
        doc = frappe.get_doc("Sales Order", so_name)
        
        if doc.docstatus == 0:
            doc.delete()
            deleted_count += 1
            
    except Exception as e:
        failed_count += 1
        # Capture error but don't crash the script
        errors.append(f"{so_name}: {str(e)}")

# --- LOGGING ---
# Only write to logs if something actually happened
if deleted_count > 0 or failed_count > 0:
    message = f"Cleanup Draft SOs: Cutoff={cutoff}, Deleted={deleted_count}, Failed={failed_count}"
    frappe.logger().info(message)
    if errors:
        frappe.logger().error(f"Cleanup Errors: {errors}")

# Optional: Response for API testing
frappe.response["message"] = {
    "status": "Success",
    "deleted": deleted_count,
    "failed": failed_count,
    "cutoff": str(cutoff)
}

name: 34_book_agent_penalty
script:
# Combined Penalty Script (Direct Mapping)
# Updated for Dynamic Cost Center (Location) priority

# 1. DEFINE MAPPING LOGIC DIRECTLY
def get_map(key, company):
    mapping = frappe.get_all("GL Account Mapping", 
        filters={"mapping_key": key, "company": company, "is_active": 1}, 
        fields=["account", "cost_center", "name"],
        order_by="priority desc", limit=1)
    if not mapping:
        frappe.throw(f"Error: No GL Account found for key '{key}' in company '{company}'")
    return mapping[0]

# 2. RESOLVE ACCOUNTS
receivable_map = get_map("AGENT_PENALTY_PAYABLE", doc.company)
recovery_map   = get_map("AGENT_PENALTY_INCOME", doc.company)

# 3. CORE PENALTY LOGIC
for item in doc.items:
    if not item.sales_order:
        continue

    so_data = frappe.db.get_value("Sales Order", item.sales_order, ["custom_dec_1", "owner", "cost_center"], as_dict=True)
    if not so_data or not so_data.custom_dec_1:
        continue

    total_penalty = frappe.utils.flt(so_data.custom_dec_1)
    if total_penalty <= 0:
        continue

    emp_id = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", {"user_id": so_data.owner}, "name")
    if not emp_id:
        continue

    # Determine Branch Location: Priority to Invoice CC, then SO CC, then fallback
    target_cc = doc.cost_center or so_data.cost_center or "Main - S"

    part = frappe.utils.flt(total_penalty / 4, 2)
    amounts = [part, part, part, frappe.utils.flt(total_penalty - part * 3, 2)]

    for i, amt in enumerate(amounts, start=1):
        if frappe.utils.flt(amt, 2) == 0:
            continue

        je = frappe.new_doc("Journal Entry")
        je.company = doc.company
        je.posting_date = frappe.utils.add_days(doc.posting_date, i * 30)
        je.remark = f"Agent Penalty {i}/4 - Inv: {doc.name}"

        # DEBIT: Employee Penalties Receivable
        je.append("accounts", {
            "account": receivable_map["account"],
            "party_type": "Employee",
            "party": emp_id,
            "employee": emp_id, # Dimension satisfy
            "debit_in_account_currency": amt,
            "cost_center": target_cc # Priority given to actual branch (e.g. Al-Khoms)
        })

        # CREDIT: Company income
        je.append("accounts", {
            "account": recovery_map["account"],
            "employee": emp_id, # Dimension satisfy
            "credit_in_account_currency": amt,
            "cost_center": target_cc # Priority given to actual branch
        })

        je.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        je.submit()
    break

script:
# LMT Debt Collection - Week Lock (SAFE for Server Script safe_exec)
# DocType Event: LMT Debt Collection
# Event: Before Insert  (recommended)  OR Before Save (ok)
# IMPORTANT: No imports, no frappe.get_roles, no underscore function names.

BYPASS_ROLES = ["Accounts Manager", "Accounts User", "System Manager"]

DAY_TO_INT = {
    "Saturday": 0,
    "Sunday": 1,
    "Monday": 2,
    "Tuesday": 3,
    "Wednesday": 4,
    "Thursday": 5,
    "Friday": 6,
}

user = frappe.session.user or ""

# Always allow Administrator (and don't crash Guest)
if user in ("Administrator", "Guest"):
    pass
else:
    # ---- Role bypass (NO frappe.get_roles) ----
    bypass = False

    # "Has Role" stores roles assigned to user
    # parent = user, role = Role Name
    rows = frappe.get_all(
        "Has Role",
        filters={"parent": user, "parenttype": "User"},
        fields=["role"],
        limit_page_length=200
    )

    user_roles = []
    i = 0
    while i < len(rows):
        r = rows[i]
        if r and r.get("role"):
            user_roles.append(r.get("role"))
        i += 1

    j = 0
    while j < len(BYPASS_ROLES):
        if BYPASS_ROLES[j] in user_roles:
            bypass = True
            break
        j += 1

    if not bypass:
        # ---- Read user window ----
        start_day = frappe.db.get_value("User", user, "lmt_week_start_day")
        end_day = frappe.db.get_value("User", user, "lmt_week_end_day")

        # If not configured -> ALLOW (prevents blocking users by mistake)
        if start_day and end_day:
            start_i = DAY_TO_INT.get(start_day)
            end_i = DAY_TO_INT.get(end_day)

            if (start_i is not None) and (end_i is not None):
                # Python weekday: Mon=0..Sun=6
                today_py = frappe.utils.getdate(frappe.utils.nowdate()).weekday()
                # Convert to Sat=0..Fri=6
                today_i = (today_py + 2) % 7

                allowed = False

                if start_i <= end_i:
                    # normal range
                    if start_i <= today_i <= end_i:
                        allowed = True
                else:
                    # wrap-around
                    if today_i >= start_i or today_i <= end_i:
                        allowed = True

                if not allowed:
                    frappe.throw("🔒 هذا السجل مقفل خارج فترة الأسبوع المسموح بها للمندوب.", title="Week Locked")

DAY_TO_INT = {
    "Saturday": 0,
    "Sunday": 1,
    "Monday": 2,
    "Tuesday": 3,
    "Wednesday": 4,
    "Thursday": 5,
    "Friday": 6,
}

user = frappe.session.user or ""

# Always allow Administrator (and don't crash for Guest)
if user in ("Administrator", "Guest"):
    pass
else:
    # ---- Role bypass (safe_exec: do NOT use frappe.get_roles) ----
    role_rows = frappe.get_all(
        "Has Role",
        filters={"parent": user},
        fields=["role"],
        limit_page_length=200
    )

    bypass = False
    for rr in role_rows:
        if (rr.get("role") or "") in BYPASS_ROLES:
            bypass = True
            break

    if not bypass:
        # ---- Read user week window ----
        start_day = frappe.db.get_value("User", user, "lmt_week_start_day")
        end_day = frappe.db.get_value("User", user, "lmt_week_end_day")

        # If not configured -> ALLOW (prevents accidental lockout)
        if start_day and end_day:
            start_i = DAY_TO_INT.get(start_day)
            end_i = DAY_TO_INT.get(end_day)

            if (start_i is not None) and (end_i is not None):
                # Python weekday: Mon=0..Sun=6
                today_py = frappe.utils.getdate(frappe.utils.nowdate()).weekday()
                # Convert to: Sat=0..Fri=6
                today_i = (today_py + 2) % 7

                allowed = False
                if start_i <= end_i:
                    # Normal range
                    if start_i <= today_i <= end_i:
                        allowed = True
                else:
                    # Wrap-around range
                    if (today_i >= start_i) or (today_i <= end_i):
                        allowed = True

                if not allowed:
                    frappe.throw("🔒 هذا السجل مقفل خارج فترة الأسبوع المسموح بها للمندوب.", title="Week Locked")

def is_admin(user):
    if user == "Administrator":
        return True
    # safe_exec blocks frappe.get_roles -> use SQL on Has Role
    ok = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT 1
        FROM `tabHas Role`
        WHERE parent=%s AND role='System Manager'
        LIMIT 1
    """, (user,))
    return bool(ok)

def execute():
    user = frappe.session.user
    if user == "Guest":
        frappe.throw("Login required")

    # Agents = users actually used as Customer.account_manager
    agent_rows = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT DISTINCT account_manager
        FROM `tabCustomer`
        WHERE IFNULL(account_manager,'') != ''
    """, as_dict=False)
    agent_users = [r[0] for r in agent_rows if r and r[0] and r[0] != "Guest"]

    # Apply supervisor restriction (admin sees all)
    if not is_admin(user):
        supervised = frappe.get_all(
            "User",
            filters={"enabled": 1, "lmt_supervisor_user": user},
            pluck="name"
        ) or []

        if supervised:
            agent_users = [u for u in agent_users if u in supervised]
        else:
            # if user is not a supervisor, show only himself (if he's an agent)
            agent_users = [user] if user in agent_users else []

    if not agent_users:
        frappe.response["message"] = {"agents": []}
        return

    rows = frappe.get_all(
        "User",
        filters={"enabled": 1, "name": ["in", agent_users], "name": ["!=", "Guest"]},
        fields=["name as user", "full_name"],
        order_by="full_name asc"
    )

    frappe.response["message"] = {"agents": rows}

execute()

        LIMIT 1

    return bool(ok)

def execute():
    user = frappe.session.user
    if user == "Guest":
        frappe.throw("Login required")

    filters = frappe.form_dict.get("filters") or {}
    if isinstance(filters, str):
        try:
            filters = json["loads"](filters)   # safe_exec provides json as dict
        except Exception:
            filters = {}

    allowed_agents = None
    if not is_admin(user):
        allowed_agents = frappe.get_all(
            "User",
            filters={"enabled": 1, "lmt_supervisor_user": user},
            pluck="name"
        ) or []

        # if not supervisor, allow only self (so agents can see their own visits)
        if not allowed_agents:
            allowed_agents = [user]

    cond = []
    args = {}

    if filters.get("agent"):
        cond.append("v.sales_user = %(agent)s")
        args["agent"] = filters["agent"]

    if filters.get("from_date"):
        cond.append("DATE(v.visit_datetime) >= %(from_date)s")
        args["from_date"] = filters["from_date"]

    if filters.get("to_date"):
        cond.append("DATE(v.visit_datetime) <= %(to_date)s")
        args["to_date"] = filters["to_date"]

    if filters.get("customer_q"):
        cond.append("(c.customer_name LIKE %(cq)s OR v.customer LIKE %(cq)s)")
        args["cq"] = f"%{filters['customer_q']}%"

    if allowed_agents is not None:
        cond.append("v.sales_user IN %(allowed)s")
        args["allowed"] = tuple(allowed_agents)

    where_sql = ("WHERE " + " AND ".join(cond)) if cond else ""

    sql = f"""
        SELECT
            v.name,
            v.customer,
            c.customer_name,
            v.sales_user,
            u.full_name AS sales_user_full_name,
            v.visit_datetime,
            v.latitude,
            v.longitude,
            v.accuracy_m,

        LEFT JOIN `tabCustomer` c ON c.name = v.customer
        LEFT JOIN `tabUser` u ON u.name = v.sales_user
        {where_sql}
        ORDER BY v.visit_datetime DESC
        LIMIT 2000
    """

    rows = frappe.db.sql(sql, args, as_dict=True)
    frappe.response["message"] = {"visits": rows}

execute()

# Safe Exec friendly: no imports

# ==========================================================
# API Name: lmt_inventory_meta
# ABSOLUTE UI restriction:
# - If user has role "Warehouse User" => ONLY warehouses from User Permission (Allow=Warehouse)
# - Debug included to verify what server sees
# ==========================================================

def get_roles_sql(user):
    rows = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT role
        FROM `tabHas Role`
        WHERE parent = %(user)s
          AND parenttype = 'User'
        LIMIT 500
    """, {"user": user}, as_dict=True) or []
    out = []
    for r in rows:
        role = (r.get("role") or "").strip()
        if role and role not in out:
            out.append(role)
    return out

def is_warehouse_user_sql(user):
    roles = get_roles_sql(user)
    return ("Warehouse User" in roles)

def get_user_perm_warehouses(user):
    rows = frappe.get_all(
        "User Permission",
        filters={"user": user, "allow": "Warehouse"},
        fields=["for_value"],
        limit_page_length=500
    ) or []
    out = []
    for r in rows:
        w = (r.get("for_value") or "").strip()
        if w and w not in out:
            out.append(w)
    return out


# ---------------- Main ----------------
user = frappe.session.user

if user == "Guest":
    frappe.throw("Not allowed")

has_wh_role = 1 if is_warehouse_user_sql(user) else 0
allowed = []
restricted = False

if has_wh_role:
    restricted = True
    allowed = get_user_perm_warehouses(user)

# Warehouses list
if restricted:
    if not allowed:
        warehouses = []
    else:
        warehouses = frappe.db.sql("""
            SELECT name

            WHERE IFNULL(disabled, 0) = 0
              AND IFNULL(is_group, 0) = 0
              AND name IN %(allowed)s

        SELECT name

""", as_dict=True) or []

name: lmt_inventory_rows
script:
# Safe Exec friendly: no imports, no frappe.parse_json, no tuple-unpacking, no str.format, no f-strings

# ==========================================================
# API Name: lmt_inventory_rows
# Purpose:
# - Return inventory rows using Serial and Batch Bundle
# - ABSOLUTE restriction:
#   If user has role "Warehouse User" => ONLY warehouses from User Permission (Allow=Warehouse)
#   Even if JS sends "__ALL__" or other warehouses, server will enforce.
# ==========================================================

def parse_json_list_of_strings(raw, default_value=None):
    if default_value is None:
        default_value = []
    if raw is None:
        return default_value

    if isinstance(raw, (list, tuple)):
        out0 = []
        for x in raw:
            s0 = str(x).strip()
            if s0:
                out0.append(s0)
        return out0

    s = str(raw).strip()
    if not s:
        return default_value

    if s[0] == "[" and s[-1] == "]":
        inner = s[1:-1].strip()
        if not inner:
            return []
        out = []
        cur = ""
        in_q = False
        q_char = ""
        esc = False

        for ch in inner:
            if esc:
                cur += ch
                esc = False
                continue
            if ch == "\\":
                esc = True
                continue

            if in_q:
                if ch == q_char:
                    in_q = False
                else:
                    cur += ch
            else:
                if ch == "'" or ch == '"':
                    in_q = True
                    q_char = ch
                elif ch == ",":
                    val = cur.strip()
                    if val:
                        out.append(val)
                    cur = ""
                else:
                    if ch not in (" ", "\t", "\n", "\r"):
                        cur += ch

        val = cur.strip()
        if val:
            out.append(val)

        out2 = []
        for x in out:
            x2 = str(x).strip()
            if x2:
                out2.append(x2)
        return out2

    out3 = []
    parts = s.split(",")
    for p in parts:
        p2 = str(p).strip()
        if p2:
            out3.append(p2)
    return out3


def sql_has_column(doctype, fieldname):
    table = "tab" + doctype
    rows = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT 1
        FROM information_schema.COLUMNS
        WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
          AND TABLE_NAME = %(table)s
          AND COLUMN_NAME = %(col)s
        LIMIT 1
    """, {"table": table, "col": fieldname}, as_dict=True) or []
    return bool(rows)


def detect_bundle_child_table():
    rows = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT options
        FROM `tabDocField`
        WHERE parent = 'Serial and Batch Bundle'
          AND parenttype = 'DocType'
          AND fieldtype = 'Table'
          AND options IS NOT NULL
          AND options != ''
        ORDER BY idx ASC
        LIMIT 1
    """, as_dict=True) or []

    if not rows:
        frappe.throw("Serial and Batch Bundle has no Table field (cannot detect child doctype).")

    child_dt = (rows[0].get("options") or "").strip()
    if not child_dt:
        frappe.throw("Detected empty child doctype for Serial and Batch Bundle.")

    child_table = "tab" + child_dt

    try:
        frappe.db.sql("SELECT 1 FROM `" + child_table + "` LIMIT 1")
    except Exception:
        frappe.throw("Detected child doctype '" + child_dt + "' but SQL table '" + child_table + "' does not exist.")

    return [child_dt, child_table]


def detect_child_fields(child_dt):
    dfs = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT fieldname, fieldtype, options
        FROM `tabDocField`
        WHERE parent = %(dt)s
          AND parenttype = 'DocType'
          AND fieldname IS NOT NULL
          AND fieldname != ''
        ORDER BY idx ASC
    """, {"dt": child_dt}, as_dict=True) or []

    batch_candidates = []
    qty_candidates = []
    item_candidates = []

    for d in dfs:
        fn = (d.get("fieldname") or "").strip()
        ft = (d.get("fieldtype") or "").strip()
        op = (d.get("options") or "").strip()

        if not fn:
            continue

        # Batch field
        if ft == "Link" and op == "Batch":
            batch_candidates.append(fn)
        elif fn in ("batch_no", "batch", "batch_number"):
            batch_candidates.append(fn)

        # Item field
        if ft == "Link" and op == "Item":
            item_candidates.append(fn)
        elif fn in ("item_code", "item", "item_id"):
            item_candidates.append(fn)

        # Qty candidates
        if ft in ("Float", "Int", "Currency"):
            qty_candidates.append(fn)

    batch_field = ""
    if "batch_no" in batch_candidates:
        batch_field = "batch_no"
    elif "batch" in batch_candidates:
        batch_field = "batch"
    elif batch_candidates:
        batch_field = batch_candidates[0]

    qty_field = ""
    if "qty" in qty_candidates:
        qty_field = "qty"
    elif "quantity" in qty_candidates:
        qty_field = "quantity"
    elif "stock_qty" in qty_candidates:
        qty_field = "stock_qty"
    elif "actual_qty" in qty_candidates:
        qty_field = "actual_qty"
    elif qty_candidates:
        qty_field = qty_candidates[0]

    item_field = ""
    if "item_code" in item_candidates:
        item_field = "item_code"
    elif "item" in item_candidates:
        item_field = "item"
    elif item_candidates:
        item_field = item_candidates[0]

    if not batch_field:
        frappe.throw("Cannot detect Batch field in child doctype '" + child_dt + "'.")
    if not qty_field:
        frappe.throw("Cannot detect Qty field in child doctype '" + child_dt + "'.")

    return [batch_field, qty_field, item_field]


# ===========================
# ABSOLUTE WAREHOUSE RESTRICTION HELPERS (SQL-based roles)
# ===========================
def get_roles_sql(user):
    rows = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT role
        FROM `tabHas Role`
        WHERE parent = %(user)s
          AND parenttype = 'User'
        LIMIT 500
    """, {"user": user}, as_dict=True) or []
    out = []
    for r in rows:
        role = (r.get("role") or "").strip()
        if role and role not in out:
            out.append(role)
    return out

def is_warehouse_user_sql(user):
    return ("Warehouse User" in (get_roles_sql(user) or []))

def get_user_perm_warehouses(user):
    rows = frappe.get_all(
        "User Permission",
        filters={"user": user, "allow": "Warehouse"},
        fields=["for_value"],
        limit_page_length=500
    ) or []
    out = []
    for r in rows:
        w = (r.get("for_value") or "").strip()
        if w and w not in out:
            out.append(w)
    return out


# ===========================
# INPUTS
# ===========================
user = frappe.session.user
if user == "Guest":
    frappe.throw("Not allowed")

item_code = (frappe.form_dict.get("item_code") or "").strip()

warehouses_raw = frappe.form_dict.get("warehouses")
if warehouses_raw is None:
    warehouses_raw = frappe.form_dict.get("warehouses_json")
if warehouses_raw is None:
    warehouses_raw = '["__ALL__"]'

hide_zero = str(frappe.form_dict.get("hide_zero") or "1").lower() in ("1", "true", "yes")

# parse requested warehouses
warehouses = parse_json_list_of_strings(warehouses_raw, default_value=["__ALL__"])
if not warehouses:
    warehouses = ["__ALL__"]

# initial "all" flag from request
wh_all = (len(warehouses) == 1 and warehouses[0] == "__ALL__")

# ===========================
# APPLY RESTRICTION (server-side)
# ===========================
restriction_applied = 0
allowed_wh = []

if is_warehouse_user_sql(user):
    restriction_applied = 1
    allowed_wh = get_user_perm_warehouses(user)

    # No allowed warehouses => return empty safely (NO top-level return)
    if not allowed_wh:
        frappe.response["message"] = {
            "rows": [],
            "totals": {"total_items": 0, "total_qty": 0},
            "meta": {
                "warehouse_restriction_applied": 1,
                "user": user,
                "allowed_wh": [],
                "note": "Warehouse User has no User Permission warehouses"
            }
        }
        stop_processing = 1
    else:
        stop_processing = 0

        # If request is ALL => replace with allowed list
        if wh_all:
            warehouses = allowed_wh[:]
            wh_all = False
        else:
            # Filter requested to allowed intersection
            allow_map = {}
            for a in allowed_wh:
                allow_map[a] = 1
            final_wh = []
            for w in warehouses:
                if w in allow_map and w not in final_wh:
                    final_wh.append(w)
            warehouses = final_wh
            wh_all = False

        # If after filtering nothing remains => empty
        if not warehouses:
            frappe.response["message"] = {
                "rows": [],
                "totals": {"total_items": 0, "total_qty": 0},
                "meta": {
                    "warehouse_restriction_applied": 1,
                    "user": user,
                    "allowed_wh": allowed_wh,
                    "note": "Requested warehouses not allowed"
                }
            }
            stop_processing = 1
else:
    stop_processing = 0


# ===========================
# MAIN QUERY (only if not stopped)
# ===========================
if not stop_processing:

    tmp = detect_bundle_child_table()
    child_dt = tmp[0]
    child_table = tmp[1]

    tmp2 = detect_child_fields(child_dt)
    batch_field = tmp2[0]
    qty_field = tmp2[1]
    item_field = tmp2[2]  # may be ""

    sle_has_is_cancelled = sql_has_column("Stock Ledger Entry", "is_cancelled")
    sle_has_bundle = sql_has_column("Stock Ledger Entry", "serial_and_batch_bundle")
    if not sle_has_bundle:
        frappe.throw("Stock Ledger Entry has no column 'serial_and_batch_bundle' in this build.")

    conditions = [
        "sle.docstatus = 1",
        "sle.serial_and_batch_bundle IS NOT NULL",
        "sle.serial_and_batch_bundle != ''"
    ]
    if sle_has_is_cancelled:
        conditions.append("sle.is_cancelled = 0")

    params = {}

    if item_code:
        conditions.append("sle.item_code = %(item_code)s")
        params["item_code"] = item_code

    # IMPORTANT: enforce warehouses if not wh_all
    if not wh_all:
        conditions.append("sle.warehouse IN %(warehouses)s")
        params["warehouses"] = tuple(warehouses)

    where_clause = " AND ".join(conditions)

    join_item_clause = ""
    if item_field:
        join_item_clause = " AND sbe." + item_field + " = sle.item_code "

    probe_sql = (
        "SELECT MIN(IFNULL(sbe." + qty_field + ",0)) as mn "
        "FROM `tabStock Ledger Entry` sle "
        "INNER JOIN `tabSerial and Batch Bundle` sbb ON sbb.name = sle.serial_and_batch_bundle "
        "INNER JOIN `" + child_table + "` sbe "
        "  ON sbe.parent = sbb.name "
        " AND sbe.parenttype = 'Serial and Batch Bundle' "
        + join_item_clause +
        "WHERE " + where_clause + " "
    )

    probe = frappe.db.sql(probe_sql, params, as_dict=True) or []
    mn = 0.0
    if probe:
        try:
            mn = float(probe[0].get("mn") or 0)
        except Exception:
            mn = 0.0

    child_qty_is_signed = (mn < 0)

    if child_qty_is_signed:
        qty_expr = "ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(sbe." + qty_field + ",0)), 6)"
    else:
        qty_expr = (
            "ROUND(SUM( CASE "
            "WHEN IFNULL(sle.actual_qty,0) >= 0 THEN IFNULL(sbe." + qty_field + ",0) "
            "ELSE -IFNULL(sbe." + qty_field + ",0) "
            "END ), 6)"
        )

    having = ""
    if hide_zero:
        having = "HAVING " + qty_expr + " != 0"

    sql = (
        "SELECT "
        " sle.item_code, "
        " it.item_name, "
        " sle.warehouse, "
        " IFNULL(sbe." + batch_field + ",'') as batch_no, "
        " DATE_FORMAT(MAX(bt.expiry_date), '%%Y-%%m-%%d') as expiry_date, "
        " " + qty_expr + " as qty "
        "FROM `tabStock Ledger Entry` sle "
        "INNER JOIN `tabItem` it ON it.name = sle.item_code "
        "INNER JOIN `tabSerial and Batch Bundle` sbb ON sbb.name = sle.serial_and_batch_bundle "
        "INNER JOIN `" + child_table + "` sbe "
        "  ON sbe.parent = sbb.name "
        " AND sbe.parenttype = 'Serial and Batch Bundle' "
        + join_item_clause +
        "LEFT JOIN `tabBatch` bt ON bt.name = sbe." + batch_field + " "
        "WHERE " + where_clause + " "
        "GROUP BY sle.item_code, sle.warehouse, IFNULL(sbe." + batch_field + ",'') "
        " " + having + " "
        "ORDER BY sle.warehouse asc, sle.item_code asc, batch_no asc "
        "LIMIT 5000"
    )

    rows = frappe.db.sql(sql, params, as_dict=True) or []

    total_qty = 0.0
    clean_rows = []
    for r in rows:
        qty = float(r.get("qty") or 0)
        total_qty += qty
        clean_rows.append({
            "item_code": r.get("item_code"),
            "item_name": r.get("item_name"),
            "warehouse": r.get("warehouse"),
            "batch_no": r.get("batch_no") or "",
            "expiry_date": r.get("expiry_date") or "",
            "qty": qty
        })

    frappe.response["message"] = {
        "rows": clean_rows,
        "totals": {
            "total_items": len(clean_rows),
            "total_qty": round(total_qty, 6)
        },
        "meta": {
            "warehouse_restriction_applied": restriction_applied,
            "user": user,
            "allowed_wh": allowed_wh,
            "requested_wh_all": 1 if (str(warehouses_raw).find("__ALL__") != -1) else 0,
            "final_wh_all": 1 if wh_all else 0,
            "final_warehouses": warehouses,
            "bundle_child_doctype": child_dt,
            "bundle_child_table": child_table,
            "child_batch_field": batch_field,
            "child_qty_field": qty_field,
            "child_item_field": item_field,
            "child_qty_is_signed": child_qty_is_signed,
            "hide_zero": 1 if hide_zero else 0,
            "sle_has_is_cancelled": 1 if sle_has_is_cancelled else 0
        }
    }

script:
# Safe Exec friendly: no imports, no frappe.parse_json, no tuple-unpacking, no str.format, no f-strings

# ==========================================================
# API Name: lmt_inventory_print_create
# Purpose:
# - Create LMT Inventory Status doc for PDF printing
# - ABSOLUTE restriction:
#   If user has role "Warehouse User" => ONLY warehouses from User Permission (Allow=Warehouse)
# ==========================================================

def parse_json_list_of_strings(raw, default_value=None):
    if default_value is None:
        default_value = []
    if raw is None:
        return default_value

    if isinstance(raw, (list, tuple)):
        out0 = []
        for x in raw:
            s0 = str(x).strip()
            if s0:
                out0.append(s0)
        return out0

    s = str(raw).strip()
    if not s:
        return default_value

    if s[0] == "[" and s[-1] == "]":
        inner = s[1:-1].strip()
        if not inner:
            return []
        out = []
        cur = ""
        in_q = False
        q_char = ""
        esc = False

        for ch in inner:
            if esc:
                cur += ch
                esc = False
                continue
            if ch == "\\":
                esc = True
                continue

            if in_q:
                if ch == q_char:
                    in_q = False
                else:
                    cur += ch
            else:
                if ch == "'" or ch == '"':
                    in_q = True
                    q_char = ch
                elif ch == ",":
                    val = cur.strip()
                    if val:
                        out.append(val)
                    cur = ""
                else:
                    if ch not in (" ", "\t", "\n", "\r"):
                        cur += ch

        val = cur.strip()
        if val:
            out.append(val)

        out2 = []
        for x in out:
            x2 = str(x).strip()
            if x2:
                out2.append(x2)
        return out2

    out3 = []
    parts = s.split(",")
    for p in parts:
        p2 = str(p).strip()
        if p2:
            out3.append(p2)
    return out3


def sql_has_column(doctype, fieldname):
    table = "tab" + doctype
    rows = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT 1
        FROM information_schema.COLUMNS
        WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
          AND TABLE_NAME = %(table)s
          AND COLUMN_NAME = %(col)s
        LIMIT 1
    """, {"table": table, "col": fieldname}, as_dict=True) or []
    return bool(rows)


def get_default_company_sql():
    rows = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT value
        FROM `tabSingles`
        WHERE doctype = 'Global Defaults'
          AND field = 'default_company'
        LIMIT 1
    """, as_dict=True) or []

    if rows:
        dc = (rows[0].get("value") or "").strip()
        if dc:
            return dc

    rows2 = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT name
        FROM `tabCompany`
        ORDER BY creation ASC
        LIMIT 1
    """, as_dict=True) or []

    if rows2:
        nm = (rows2[0].get("name") or "").strip()
        if nm:
            return nm

    return ""


def get_today_sql():
    rows = frappe.db.sql("SELECT CURDATE() as d", as_dict=True) or []
    if rows:
        d = rows[0].get("d")
        if d is None:
            return ""
        return str(d)
    return ""


def detect_bundle_child_table():
    rows = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT options
        FROM `tabDocField`
        WHERE parent = 'Serial and Batch Bundle'
          AND parenttype = 'DocType'
          AND fieldtype = 'Table'
          AND options IS NOT NULL
          AND options != ''
        ORDER BY idx ASC
        LIMIT 1
    """, as_dict=True) or []

    if not rows:
        frappe.throw("Serial and Batch Bundle has no Table field (cannot detect child doctype).")

    child_dt = (rows[0].get("options") or "").strip()
    if not child_dt:
        frappe.throw("Detected empty child doctype for Serial and Batch Bundle.")

    child_table = "tab" + child_dt

    try:
        frappe.db.sql("SELECT 1 FROM `" + child_table + "` LIMIT 1")
    except Exception:
        frappe.throw("Detected child doctype '" + child_dt + "' but SQL table '" + child_table + "' does not exist.")

    return [child_dt, child_table]


def detect_child_fields(child_dt):
    dfs = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT fieldname, fieldtype, options
        FROM `tabDocField`
        WHERE parent = %(dt)s
          AND parenttype = 'DocType'
          AND fieldname IS NOT NULL
          AND fieldname != ''
        ORDER BY idx ASC
    """, {"dt": child_dt}, as_dict=True) or []

    batch_candidates = []
    qty_candidates = []
    item_candidates = []

    for d in dfs:
        fn = (d.get("fieldname") or "").strip()
        ft = (d.get("fieldtype") or "").strip()
        op = (d.get("options") or "").strip()

        if not fn:
            continue

        if ft == "Link" and op == "Batch":
            batch_candidates.append(fn)
        elif fn in ("batch_no", "batch", "batch_number"):
            batch_candidates.append(fn)

        if ft == "Link" and op == "Item":
            item_candidates.append(fn)
        elif fn in ("item_code", "item", "item_id"):
            item_candidates.append(fn)

        if ft in ("Float", "Int", "Currency"):
            qty_candidates.append(fn)

    batch_field = ""
    if "batch_no" in batch_candidates:
        batch_field = "batch_no"
    elif "batch" in batch_candidates:
        batch_field = "batch"
    elif batch_candidates:
        batch_field = batch_candidates[0]

    qty_field = ""
    if "qty" in qty_candidates:
        qty_field = "qty"
    elif "quantity" in qty_candidates:
        qty_field = "quantity"
    elif "stock_qty" in qty_candidates:
        qty_field = "stock_qty"
    elif "actual_qty" in qty_candidates:
        qty_field = "actual_qty"
    elif qty_candidates:
        qty_field = qty_candidates[0]

    item_field = ""
    if "item_code" in item_candidates:
        item_field = "item_code"
    elif "item" in item_candidates:
        item_field = "item"
    elif item_candidates:
        item_field = item_candidates[0]

    if not batch_field:
        frappe.throw("Cannot detect Batch field in child doctype '" + child_dt + "'.")
    if not qty_field:
        frappe.throw("Cannot detect Qty field in child doctype '" + child_dt + "'.")

    return [batch_field, qty_field, item_field]


# ===========================
# ABSOLUTE WAREHOUSE RESTRICTION HELPERS (SQL roles)
# ===========================
def get_roles_sql(user):
    rows = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT role
        FROM `tabHas Role`
        WHERE parent = %(user)s
          AND parenttype = 'User'
        LIMIT 500
    """, {"user": user}, as_dict=True) or []
    out = []
    for r in rows:
        role = (r.get("role") or "").strip()
        if role and role not in out:
            out.append(role)
    return out

def is_warehouse_user_sql(user):
    return ("Warehouse User" in (get_roles_sql(user) or []))

def get_user_perm_warehouses(user):
    rows = frappe.get_all(
        "User Permission",
        filters={"user": user, "allow": "Warehouse"},
        fields=["for_value"],
        limit_page_length=500
    ) or []
    out = []
    for r in rows:
        w = (r.get("for_value") or "").strip()
        if w and w not in out:
            out.append(w)
    return out


# ---------------- Inputs ----------------
user = frappe.session.user
if user == "Guest":
    frappe.throw("Not allowed")

item_code = (frappe.form_dict.get("item_code") or "").strip()

warehouses_raw = frappe.form_dict.get("warehouses")
if warehouses_raw is None:
    warehouses_raw = frappe.form_dict.get("warehouses_json")
if warehouses_raw is None:
    warehouses_raw = '["__ALL__"]'

hide_zero = str(frappe.form_dict.get("hide_zero") or "1").lower() in ("1", "true", "yes")

warehouses = parse_json_list_of_strings(warehouses_raw, default_value=["__ALL__"])
if not warehouses:
    warehouses = ["__ALL__"]

wh_all = (len(warehouses) == 1 and warehouses[0] == "__ALL__")

# ---------------- Enforce restriction ----------------
restriction_applied = 0
allowed_wh = []

if is_warehouse_user_sql(user):
    restriction_applied = 1
    allowed_wh = get_user_perm_warehouses(user)

    if not allowed_wh:
        frappe.throw("لا يوجد لديك صلاحية لمشاهدة أي مخزن")

    if wh_all:
        warehouses = allowed_wh[:]
        wh_all = False
    else:
        allow_map = {}
        for a in allowed_wh:
            allow_map[a] = 1
        final_wh = []
        for w in warehouses:
            if w in allow_map and w not in final_wh:
                final_wh.append(w)
        warehouses = final_wh
        wh_all = False

    if not warehouses:
        frappe.throw("لا يوجد لديك صلاحية للمخازن المطلوبة")

warehouses_text = "ALL WAREHOUSES" if wh_all else ", ".join(warehouses)

# ---------------- Detect Bundle tables/fields ----------------
tmp = detect_bundle_child_table()
child_dt = tmp[0]
child_table = tmp[1]

tmp2 = detect_child_fields(child_dt)
batch_field = tmp2[0]
qty_field = tmp2[1]
item_field = tmp2[2]  # may be ""

# ---------------- Safety columns ----------------
sle_has_is_cancelled = sql_has_column("Stock Ledger Entry", "is_cancelled")
sle_has_bundle = sql_has_column("Stock Ledger Entry", "serial_and_batch_bundle")
if not sle_has_bundle:
    frappe.throw("Stock Ledger Entry has no column 'serial_and_batch_bundle' in this build.")

# ---------------- Query base ----------------
conditions = [
    "sle.docstatus = 1",
    "sle.serial_and_batch_bundle IS NOT NULL",
    "sle.serial_and_batch_bundle != ''"
]
if sle_has_is_cancelled:
    conditions.append("sle.is_cancelled = 0")

params = {}

if item_code:
    conditions.append("sle.item_code = %(item_code)s")
    params["item_code"] = item_code

if not wh_all:
    conditions.append("sle.warehouse IN %(warehouses)s")
    params["warehouses"] = tuple(warehouses)

where_clause = " AND ".join(conditions)

join_item_clause = ""
if item_field:
    join_item_clause = " AND sbe." + item_field + " = sle.item_code "

probe_sql = (
    "SELECT MIN(IFNULL(sbe." + qty_field + ",0)) as mn "
    "FROM `tabStock Ledger Entry` sle "
    "INNER JOIN `tabSerial and Batch Bundle` sbb ON sbb.name = sle.serial_and_batch_bundle "
    "INNER JOIN `" + child_table + "` sbe "
    "  ON sbe.parent = sbb.name "
    " AND sbe.parenttype = 'Serial and Batch Bundle' "
    + join_item_clause +
    "WHERE " + where_clause + " "
)

probe = frappe.db.sql(probe_sql, params, as_dict=True) or []
mn = 0.0
if probe:
    try:
        mn = float(probe[0].get("mn") or 0)
    except Exception:
        mn = 0.0

child_qty_is_signed = (mn < 0)

if child_qty_is_signed:
    qty_expr = "ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(sbe." + qty_field + ",0)), 6)"
else:
    qty_expr = (
        "ROUND(SUM( CASE "
        "WHEN IFNULL(sle.actual_qty,0) >= 0 THEN IFNULL(sbe." + qty_field + ",0) "
        "ELSE -IFNULL(sbe." + qty_field + ",0) "
        "END ), 6)"
    )

having = ""
if hide_zero:
    having = "HAVING " + qty_expr + " != 0"

sql = (
    "SELECT "
    " sle.item_code, "
    " it.item_name, "
    " sle.warehouse, "
    " IFNULL(sbe." + batch_field + ",'') as batch_no, "
    " DATE_FORMAT(MAX(bt.expiry_date), '%%Y-%%m-%%d') as expiry_date, "
    " " + qty_expr + " as qty "
    "FROM `tabStock Ledger Entry` sle "
    "INNER JOIN `tabItem` it ON it.name = sle.item_code "
    "INNER JOIN `tabSerial and Batch Bundle` sbb ON sbb.name = sle.serial_and_batch_bundle "
    "INNER JOIN `" + child_table + "` sbe "
    "  ON sbe.parent = sbb.name "
    " AND sbe.parenttype = 'Serial and Batch Bundle' "
    + join_item_clause +
    "LEFT JOIN `tabBatch` bt ON bt.name = sbe." + batch_field + " "
    "WHERE " + where_clause + " "
    "GROUP BY sle.item_code, sle.warehouse, IFNULL(sbe." + batch_field + ",'') "
    " " + having + " "
    "ORDER BY sle.warehouse asc, sle.item_code asc, batch_no asc "
    "LIMIT 5000"
)

rows = frappe.db.sql(sql, params, as_dict=True) or []

# ---------------- Create Print Doc ----------------
doc = frappe.new_doc("LMT Inventory Status")

company = get_default_company_sql()
if not company:
    company = ""

doc.company = company
doc.report_date = get_today_sql()
doc.warehouses_text = warehouses_text
doc.item_filter = item_code or ""
doc.remarks = "Inventory Status (Bundle Based)"

total_qty = 0.0

for r in rows:
    qty = float(r.get("qty") or 0)
    total_qty += qty

    exp = r.get("expiry_date") or ""
    if isinstance(exp, str) and (not exp.strip()):
        exp = None

    doc.append("items", {
        "item_code": r.get("item_code"),
        "item_name": r.get("item_name") or r.get("item_code"),
        "warehouse": r.get("warehouse") or "",
        "batch_no": r.get("batch_no") or "",
        "expiry_date": exp,
        "qty": qty
    })

doc.total_items = len(doc.get("items") or [])
doc.total_qty = round(total_qty, 6)

doc.flags.ignore_permissions = True
doc.insert()

frappe.response["message"] = {
    "doctype": doc.doctype,
    "name": doc.name,
    "format": "LMT Inventory Status (Arabic)",
    "meta": {
        "warehouse_restriction_applied": restriction_applied,
        "user": user,
        "allowed_wh": allowed_wh,
        "final_warehouses": warehouses
    }
}

script:
# Server Script: verify_collection_api_qa
# FIXES:
# - STRICT Agent-based Cost Center
# - Safety blocks for missing Database Columns
# - Collections = Payment Entry (with Unallocated Amount)
# - ROBUST REMARKS: Forces "Receipt ||" pattern via direct DB update.
# - SETTLEMENT: Integrated Settlement Discount JV creation.

def has_field(doctype, fieldname):
    try:
        return frappe.get_meta(doctype).has_field(fieldname)
    except Exception:
        return False

def get_mapping_account(base_key, company_name):
    abbr = frappe.db.get_value("Company", company_name, "abbr")
    keys = [base_key + "-" + abbr, base_key] if abbr else [base_key]
    try:
        rows = frappe.get_all("GL Account Mapping",
            filters={"company": company_name, "is_active": 1, "mapping_key": ["in", keys]},
            fields=["account"], limit_page_length=1)
        return rows[0].account if rows else ""
    except:
        return ""

def require_mapping(base_key, company_name, friendly_name):
    acc = get_mapping_account(base_key, company_name)
    if not acc: frappe.throw(f"Missing GL Mapping: {base_key} ({friendly_name})")
    return acc

def apply_je_dims(row, final_cc, emp):
    if final_cc: row["cost_center"] = final_cc
    if emp: row["employee"] = emp
    return row

def append_je_row(je, row, party_type_val=None, party_val=None):
    is_rp = False
    try:
        atype = frappe.db.get_value("Account", row.get("account"), "account_type")
        is_rp = atype in ("Receivable", "Payable")
    except: pass
    
    if party_type_val and party_val and is_rp:
        row["party_type"] = party_type_val
        row["party"] = party_val
    else:
        row.pop("party_type", None)
        row.pop("party", None)
    je.append("accounts", row)

def set_if_exists(doc_obj, fieldname, value):
    try:
        if has_field(doc_obj.doctype, fieldname):
            doc_obj.set(fieldname, value)
    except: pass

# -------------------- INPUT --------------------
docname = frappe.form_dict.get("docname")
if not docname: frappe.throw("docname is required")

frappe.db.sql("SELECT name FROM `tabLMT Debt Collection` WHERE name=%s FOR UPDATE", (docname,))
doc = frappe.get_doc("LMT Debt Collection", docname)

if doc.docstatus == 1 or doc.l_reconciled == 1:
    frappe.response["message"] = {"ok": True, "already_processed": True} 
else:
    company = doc.company or "الشركة الليبية الحديثة"
    amount = frappe.utils.flt(doc.amount)
    
    # -------------------- STRICT COST CENTER --------------------
    final_cc = None
    try:
        user_id = ""
        if doc.employee: user_id = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "user_id")
        if not user_id: user_id = doc.owner
        
        user_wh = None
        if user_id: user_wh = frappe.db.get_value("User", user_id, "warehouse")
        
        if user_wh:
            try: final_cc = frappe.db.get_value("Warehouse", user_wh, "custom_custom_cost_center")
            except: pass
            if not final_cc:
                try: final_cc = frappe.db.get_value("Warehouse", user_wh, "custom_cost_center")
                except: pass
    except: final_cc = None

    if not final_cc: final_cc = doc.get("cost_center")
    if not final_cc: final_cc = frappe.db.get_value("Company", company, "cost_center")

    # -------------------- PROCESS --------------------
    agent_payable = require_mapping("EMPLOYEE_DRAW", company, "Agent Payable")
    
    is_draw = False
    try: is_draw = (doc.action_type == "سحب") or (not doc.customer)
    except: pass
    
    receivable = ""
    commission_expense = ""
    commission_payable = ""
    if not is_draw:
        receivable = get_mapping_account("RECEIVABLE", company)
        if not receivable: frappe.throw("Missing RECEIVABLE Mapping")
        commission_expense = get_mapping_account("COMMISSION_EXPENSE", company)
        commission_payable = get_mapping_account("COMMISSION_PAYABLE", company)

    # Commission Calc
    pct = 0.0
    commission_amt = 0.0
    if not is_draw:
        try:
            pct = float(doc.agent_percentage or 0)
            commission_amt = round(amount * (pct / 100.0), 3)
            doc.db_set("agent_percentage", pct, update_modified=False)
            doc.db_set("agent_commission", commission_amt, update_modified=False)
        except: pass

    payment_entry_name = ""
    journal_entry_name = ""
    commission_je_name = ""
    settlement_je_name = ""

    if is_draw:
        # --- DRAW (JV) ---
        je = frappe.new_doc("Journal Entry")
        je.company = company
        je.posting_date = doc.posting_date
        je.user_remark = "Verify Draw: " + doc.name
        
        append_je_row(je, apply_je_dims({
            "account": agent_payable, "debit_in_account_currency": amount
        }, final_cc, doc.employee), "Employee", doc.employee)
        
        append_je_row(je, apply_je_dims({
            "account": doc.bank, "credit_in_account_currency": amount
        }, final_cc, doc.employee))
        
        je.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        je.submit()
        journal_entry_name = je.name
        set_if_exists(doc, "journal_entry", journal_entry_name)
        
    else:
        # --- COLLECTION (PE) ---
        pe = frappe.new_doc("Payment Entry")
        pe.payment_type = "Receive"
        pe.party_type = "Customer"
        pe.party = doc.customer
        pe.company = company
        pe.paid_from = receivable
        pe.paid_to = doc.bank
        pe.paid_amount = amount
        pe.received_amount = amount
        pe.unallocated_amount = amount
        
        if doc.employee: pe.employee = doc.employee
        if final_cc: pe.cost_center = final_cc
        if has_field("Payment Entry", "reference_no"): pe.reference_no = doc.receipt_no
        if has_field("Payment Entry", "reference_date"): pe.reference_date = doc.posting_date

        pe.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        pe.submit()

        # --- FORCE CORRECT COST CENTER ON GL ENTRIES ---
        if final_cc:
            gl_list = frappe.get_all('GL Entry', filters={'voucher_no': pe.name, 'is_cancelled': 0}, fields=['name'])
            for gl in gl_list:
                frappe.db.set_value('GL Entry', gl.name, 'cost_center', final_cc, update_modified=False)

        # --- FORCE FIX REMARKS (Direct DB Write) ---
        if doc.receipt_no:
            current_remark = frappe.db.get_value("Payment Entry", pe.name, "remarks") or ""
            if "||" not in current_remark:
                 new_remark = str(doc.receipt_no) + " || " + current_remark
                 frappe.db.set_value("Payment Entry", pe.name, "remarks", new_remark)

        payment_entry_name = pe.name
        set_if_exists(doc, "payment_entry", payment_entry_name)

        # --- COMMISSION (JV) ---
        if commission_amt > 0:
            cje = frappe.new_doc("Journal Entry")
            cje.company = company
            cje.posting_date = doc.posting_date
            cje.user_remark = "Commission: " + doc.name
            
            append_je_row(cje, apply_je_dims({
                "account": commission_expense, "debit_in_account_currency": commission_amt
            }, final_cc, doc.employee))
            
            append_je_row(cje, apply_je_dims({
                "account": commission_payable, "credit_in_account_currency": commission_amt
            }, final_cc, doc.employee), "Employee", doc.employee)
            
            cje.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
            cje.submit()
            commission_je_name = cje.name
            set_if_exists(doc, "commission_journal_entry", commission_je_name)

        # --- SETTLEMENT (JV) ---
        settlement_discount = frappe.utils.flt(doc.get("custom_settlement_discount", 0.0))
        
        if settlement_discount > 0:
            settlement_expense = get_mapping_account("SETTLEMENT_DISCOUNT", company)
            if not settlement_expense: frappe.throw("Missing SETTLEMENT_DISCOUNT Mapping")
            
            sje = frappe.new_doc("Journal Entry")
            sje.company = company
            sje.posting_date = doc.posting_date
            sje.user_remark = "Settlement Discount: " + doc.name
            
            append_je_row(sje, apply_je_dims({
                "account": settlement_expense, "debit_in_account_currency": settlement_discount
            }, final_cc, doc.employee))
            
            append_je_row(sje, apply_je_dims({
                "account": receivable, "credit_in_account_currency": settlement_discount
            }, final_cc, doc.employee), "Customer", doc.customer)
            
            sje.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
            sje.submit()
            settlement_je_name = sje.name
            set_if_exists(doc, "custom_settlement_jv", settlement_je_name)

    # Finalize
    doc.l_reconciled = 1
    if payment_entry_name: doc.reconcile_batch = payment_entry_name
    elif journal_entry_name: doc.reconcile_batch = journal_entry_name
    
    doc.save(ignore_permissions=True)
    if doc.docstatus==0: doc.submit()

    frappe.response["message"] = {
        "ok": True, 
        "docname": doc.name,
        "payment_entry": payment_entry_name,
        "journal_entry": journal_entry_name,
        "commission_journal_entry": commission_je_name,
        "settlement_journal_entry": settlement_je_name
    }

# Server Script: create_sales_invoice_after_upload_qa
# TYPE: API
# METHOD: create_sales_invoice_after_upload_qa
so_name = frappe.form_dict.get("so_name")
if not so_name:
    frappe.throw("Sales Order name missing")
so = frappe.get_doc("Sales Order", so_name)
existing_si = frappe.db.get_value("Sales Invoice Item", {"sales_order": so_name, "docstatus": ["<", 2]}, "parent")
if existing_si:
    frappe.response["message"] = {"ok": True, "invoice": existing_si, "status": "Already Exists", "customer": so.customer}
else:
    employee = so.employee
    if not employee:
        account_manager = frappe.db.get_value("Customer", so.customer, "account_manager")
        if account_manager:
            employee = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", {"user_id": account_manager}, "name")
    if not employee:
        frappe.throw(f"Validation Error: Customer '{so.customer}' has no Account Manager/Employee linked.")
    agent_cost_center = None
    user_warehouse = frappe.db.get_value("User", so.owner, "warehouse")
    if user_warehouse:
        agent_cost_center = frappe.db.get_value("Warehouse", user_warehouse, "custom_custom_cost_center")
    si = frappe.new_doc("Sales Invoice")
    si.customer = so.customer
    si.company = so.company
    si.posting_date = frappe.utils.nowdate()
    si.due_date = frappe.utils.nowdate()
    si.currency = so.currency
    si.conversion_rate = so.conversion_rate
    si.selling_price_list = so.selling_price_list
    si.set_warehouse = so.set_warehouse
    si.employee = employee
    if agent_cost_center:
        si.cost_center = agent_cost_center
    for item in so.items:
        row = si.append("items", {})
        row.item_code = item.item_code
        row.item_name = item.item_name
        row.description = item.description
        row.qty = item.qty
        row.uom = item.uom
        row.conversion_factor = item.conversion_factor
        row.rate = item.rate
        row.cost_center = agent_cost_center or item.cost_center
        row.warehouse = item.warehouse or so.set_warehouse
        row.sales_order = so.name
        row.so_detail = item.name
    for tax in so.taxes:
        t = si.append("taxes", {})
        t.charge_type = tax.charge_type
        t.account_head = tax.account_head
        t.description = tax.description
        t.rate = tax.rate
        t.tax_amount = tax.tax_amount
    if so.additional_discount_percentage:
        si.apply_discount_on = so.apply_discount_on or "Grand Total"
        si.additional_discount_percentage = so.additional_discount_percentage
    si.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
    si.update_stock = 0
    si.save()
    si.submit()
    frappe.response["message"] = {"ok": True, "invoice": si.name, "status": "Created & Submitted", "customer": si.customer, "employee_used": employee}
